zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fauconberg於1290年6月24日出生在英國越可爾霍爾德內斯時，他的父親Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge26歲，母親Isabel Ros35歲。他和Eve Bulmer至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Fauconberg于1290年6月24日出生在英国越可爾霍爾德內斯时，他的父亲Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge26岁，母亲Isabel Ros35岁。他和Eve Bulmer至少有6个儿子和4个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Fauconberg was born on 24 June 1290, in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, his father, Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge, was 26 and his mother, Isabel Ros, was 35. He had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with Eve Bulmer.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fauconberg est né le 24 juin 1290, à Holderness, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel Ros, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec Eve Bulmer.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Fauconberg am 24. Juni 1290 in Holderness, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge 26 und seine Mutter Isabel Ros 35. Er hatte mit Eve Bulmer mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fauconberg è nato il il 24 giugno 1290 nel Holderness, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Ros, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con Eve Bulmer.

ja.lifeSummary: John Fauconbergが1290年6月24日にイギリスヨークシュアイアホールデルネスで生まれた時，父Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconbergeは26歳，母Isabel Rosは35歳であった。彼はEve Bulmerとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: John Fauconberg(이)가 1290년 6월 24일 영국 요르크실르 홀더네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Ros(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Eve Bulmer(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Fauconberg nasceu em 24 de junho de 1290, em Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Ros, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas com Eve Bulmer.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fauconberg родился 24 июня 1290 г. в местности холдирнесс, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Ros, 35. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от Eve Bulmer.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Fauconberg nació el 24 de junio de 1290, en Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter de Fauconberge 2nd Lord Fauconberge, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabel Ros, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas con Eve Bulmer.
